notes: With-skill achieves 100% pass rate across all 8 evals — up from 96% in iteration 1
Baseline improved significantly from 40% to 68% — new outcome-quality assertions are less biased toward tool invocation
Arch (eval 6) and Onboard (eval 8) baselines now pass 100% — assertions may need to be more discriminating
Implement (eval 2) shows largest gap: 100% vs 33% — skill adds blast radius, review, knowledge capture that baseline skips entirely
Skills use 10% fewer tokens on average but take 2.2x longer due to multi-phase RAG tool workflows
Debug baseline found MORE root causes (6 vs 3) despite lower pass rate — tool process vs outcome quality tension persists
Session-start baseline produced richer output but missed workflow discipline (descriptive sessionId, context_briefing)
Review baseline found 13 issues vs 10 with-skill, but lacked pattern/ADR compliance checking
